# PHIL.190 ? Pricing Power Focus

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** value_creation
**Subcategory:** pricing_power_focus
**Domain:** VALUE_CREATION
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Build businesses that can raise prices without losing customers

## Application
Create differentiation, build switching costs, demonstrate unique value, avoid commoditization
